mechanism: Container App Jobs deploy without VNet integration — ARM API calls only. No data plane access.
why: VNet integration carries fixed monthly cost. Control-plane-only eliminates that cost while preserving full ARM resource management.

related.note: No VNet keeps jobs at zero cost at rest.
No VNet means no private registry — public pull is a consequence.

violations: Automation job making data plane calls (reading blobs, querying Key Vault secrets).
Container App Environment with VNet integration for automation.
